questions.question: 1. True density of a powder is defined as:

answers.a: Mass of powder per unit apparent volume
answers.b: Mass of powder per unit true volume excluding void spaces
answers.c: Weight of powder per bulk volume
answers.d: Ratio of volume to surface area

questions.question: 2. The instrument commonly used in solvent displacement method is:
3. The solvent used in the experiment should be:

answers.a: One in which the powder is soluble
answers.b: One in which the powder is insoluble

questions.question: 4. Entrapped air bubbles during the experiment will:

answers.c: Cause errors by increasing apparent volume

questions.question: 5. The true density (ρₜ) is calculated using the formula:

answers.a: ρₜ = Volume of powder / Weight of powder
answers.b: ρₜ = Weight of powder / Volume of liquid displaced by powder
answers.c: ρₜ = Volume of liquid / Weight of bottle
